NEET.purpose: Medical entrance examination for undergraduate medical admission.
NEET.architecture_use: Use web/search MCP for latest exam dates, syllabus, admit card notices, and official announcements.

MCAT.purpose: Medical College Admission Test for medical school admissions.
MCAT.architecture_use: Use documentation/search MCP and calendar planning tools for preparation schedules.

UCAT.purpose: Admissions test used by many medical and dental schools.
UCAT.architecture_use: Use official documentation lookup and study planning tools.
